response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js work at recent roles and current AI-agent/MCP infrastructure experience matching the AI requirement. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, C/C++, DLang, PHP), MongoDB, Docker/Kubernetes, and a demonstrated commitment to engineering craft (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching). Gaps: no explicit Nest.js, React experience is present but limited in depth shown, and Vitest/Playwright/PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned.
strengths: Strong full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience plus current AI-agent and MCP tooling work directly matching the role
Proven software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active community teaching/workshops
Broad polyglot skill set (TS, Java, C/C++, DLang, Python-adjacent) with Docker/Kubernetes and MongoDB exposure
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the primary stack
Testing framework specifics (Vitest, Playwright, Jest) not called out despite strong testing culture
PostgreSQL/relational DB experience not clearly demonstrated; MongoDB is the main DB cited

key_factors.factor: Depth of full-stack experience and engineering craft
Missing explicit Nest.js / Vitest / PostgreSQL coverage
